era: Experimental Hip-Hop. E=6 -- visionary solo voice, Butler arc culmination (103-106-144-157-170). Central District. Sub Pop. Tenth consecutive E=6 (161-170). v1.49.310.

location.formative: Central District origins. NYC for Digable Planets. Return to Seattle. Decades of experimental work from the CD.
location.career: Ishmael Butler (Alonzo Butler Jr.). Solo experimental work. Sub Pop. 2000s-present.

formed: Solo practice, ongoing from 2000s, Central District, Seattle

members.name: Ishmael Butler
members.note: Central District, Seattle. Butterfly (Digable Planets). Palaceer Lazaro (Shabazz Palaces). Knife Knights with Erik Blood.

associated_musicians.name: Tendai Maraire
associated_musicians.note: Multi-instrumentalist. Son of Dumisani Maraire (Shona mbira master).

theory_nodes.concept: Butler arc -- densest network in the engine. Four projects, five entries, one visionary. 67-degree span (103-170). Consistent E=6 across all entries. Jazz-rap to Afrofuturist to experimental to solo.
examples: Knife Knights (106): Experimental with Erik Blood.
Ishmael Butler solo (170): The visionary emerges.
theory_nodes.description: Butler arc. Densest network. Four projects. 67-degree span. Always E=6.

theory_nodes.concept: Visionary solo voice -- the artist beyond the projects. Solo work as purest expression of the experimental mind. No collaborative negotiation. Maximum creative freedom.
theory_nodes.description: Visionary solo voice. E=6 through freedom and authority.

genealogy.relationship: Ishmael Butler at 170. Solo = purest expression.

theory_nodes.concept: The return -- the visionary who left, succeeded at the highest level, and came home to build. NYC to Central District. Digable Planets to Shabazz Palaces. The return as creative act.
examples: NYC period: Digable Planets commercial/critical success.
Return to Seattle: building from home.
CD as locus of innovation because Butler was there.
theory_nodes.description: The return. NYC to CD. Building from home. The return as creative act.

genealogy.relationship: Butler's return created Seattle experimental hip-hop center of gravity.

cross_references.relationship: BUTLER ARC! Shabazz Palaces return (157) to Butler solo (170). 13 degrees. Project to individual. Same visionary.
BUTLER ARC! Digable Planets as Butterfly (144). NYC origin. 26 degrees later, solo in Seattle (170). The full arc.
BUTLER ARC! Knife Knights (106) -- Butler + Erik Blood. 64 degrees later, solo (170). Knife Knights returns at 171.
BUTLER ARC ORIGIN! First Butler entry (103). 67 degrees to solo (170). The longest arc.
CONSECUTIVE HIP-HOP! Dark cinematic (169) to experimental visionary (170). Underground to institution. E=6 to E=6.
